name: prism_pop_verification
description: Auto-generated verification suite for Prism Pop

intents.name: grid_exists
intents.description: Entity 'grid' must exist with required components

intents.name: tile_exists
intents.description: Entity 'tile' must exist with required components

intents.name: score_exists
intents.description: Entity 'score' must exist with required components

intents.name: shard_exists
intents.description: Entity 'shard' must exist with required components

intents.name: invariant_grid_always_full
intents.description: The 8x8 grid must always have exactly 64 tiles after gravity fill completes.

intents.name: invariant_score_monotonic
intents.description: Score can only increase, never decrease.

intents.name: invariant_tile_type_valid
intents.description: Tile type must be one of 5 valid jewel types (0=Ruby, 1=Sapphire, 2=Emerald, 3=Topaz, 4=Amethyst).

intents.name: invariant_tile_within_grid
intents.description: Tile grid x-position must be within 0-7.

intents.name: invariant_tile_within_grid_y
intents.description: Tile grid y-position must be within 0-7.

intents.name: degenerate_no_valid_moves
intents.description: No valid swaps exist on the board. The grid should be reshuffled to prevent a deadlocked state.

intents.name: degenerate_score_overflow
intents.description: Score exceeds the maximum displayable value.

intents.name: degenerate_infinite_cascade
intents.description: A match cascade exceeds 20 steps, suggesting an infinite loop in match/fill logic.
